name: Ricotta Gnocchi
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spinach according to package directions, then drain.
2. When cool enough to handle, press out as much water as possible using your hands.
3. In a large bowl, beat the eggs.
4. Add the ricotta cheese and mix well.
5. Stir in the bread crumbs, grated Parmesan, minced garlic, salt, pepper, nutmeg, basil, and spinach.
6. Mix everything until well combined.
7. Shape the mixture into 1 1/2 inch balls.
8. Roll each ball in flour to lightly coat.
9. Gently drop four or five gnocchi at a time into a large pot of boiling water.
10. Cook at a gentle boil for 10 minutes, then use a slotted spoon to remove the gnocchi from the water.
11. Serve with butter and grated Parmesan cheese, or with tomato sauce.
